expectations.text: Reads the WACC formula from the model (cell B16 or via inspection)
Presents the LaTeX-notation equivalent of the WACC formula
expectations.evidence: Section 2 shows LaTeX: 'WACC = E/V * Ke + D/V * Kd * (1 - T)'

expectations.text: Verifies that equity weight + debt weight equals 1.0
expectations.evidence: 'Weights sum: 0.625 + 0.375 = 1.000 OK' and 'Capital weights sum to 1.0: PASS'

expectations.text: Verifies that only the debt term is multiplied by (1 - Tax Rate)
expectations.evidence: 'Tax shield applied to debt only (correct): PASS'. The formula correctly applies (1-T) only to the debt component.

expectations.text: Verifies cost of equity and cost of debt are in the same units (both decimals or both percentages)
expectations.evidence: The report does not explicitly check unit consistency between Ke and Kd. It shows both as percentages (12.00%, 6.00%) but does not have a dedicated check confirming they are in the same units.

expectations.text: Identifies the formula uses cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.) and flags this as an IDFA violation requiring Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: Section 6 Notes mentions 'All cell references use absolute addressing ($B$10, etc.), which is appropriate since these are fixed assumption inputs.' This does NOT flag it as a violation — it considers absolute refs appropriate. No mention of IDFA or Named Range requirement.
